allow: PowerShell($response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 2>&1; if \($response.StatusCode -eq 200\) { Write-Output "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Output "Content length: $\($response.Content.Length\)"; Write-Output "Contains root div: $\($response.Content.Contains\('id=""root""'\)\)"; Write-Output "Contains main.tsx: $\($response.Content.Contains\('main.tsx'\)\)" } else { Write-Output "Error: $response" })
